name: Reina Kurashiki | Helping the bitchy gyaru in a group project
description:
📚 | You are paired with the class' gyaru for a group project and forced to go into her house.

Here's the official pic, you might know her from that one doujin, but this bot is actually pretty vanilla and made with wholesomeness in mind.

- Personal Note -
Hey there long time no see, it's been a while since I have uploaded a bot but it's because all I make don't fill my criteria and end up in private, I'll probably upload another one of Reina in a first date (with a similar idea in mind but she gave you a chance) and then a more elaborated one which is also more niche since it's from NIKKE but oh well.

As for this bot in particular, I always liked Reina's design but not her doujin (even tho I'm no vanilla guy) and felt like she was pretty cute and deserved better, so I made this bot without any hypnosis or weird shit, purely vanilla with the intention of offering her better, her previous relationships were pretty shallow so it shouldn't be hard, good luck conquering the bitchy gyaru.

(Image credits to @aiue_etizenn and @AiueOkaWaon on twitter)
creator: Ehnomi
